### Post by xdarkgokux on 2008-02-28

#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using

### Post by chrono310 on 2008-02-28
Ah, an ATI card... I have an ATI card in my desktop and had to jump through some hoops to get the dual monitors working. Here's the thread that I used to get everything set up the right way:

[http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?p=1773544](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?p=1773544)

Let me know if that helps.
